errors.evidence: Code execution used hardcoded values (8,000,000 and 1,300,000 breeding pairs) without actual data retrieval.
errors.description: Agent fabricated population data from Wikipedia and Nature.com instead of querying actual sources, violating tool output integrity.
errors.impact: Resulted in incorrect answer (540 vs true answer 116) due to unverified assumptions.

errors.evidence: No evidence of web_search or inspect_file_as_text tool calls in execution logs.
errors.description: Failed to retrieve actual population data from specified sources, relying solely on fabricated numbers.
errors.impact: Prevented accurate comparison of population estimates.

errors.evidence: Code directly assigned values instead of calling search_agent as planned.
errors.description: Incorrectly selected hardcoded values over web_search tool for population data retrieval.
errors.impact: Undermined task requirements for external data verification.

errors.evidence: Calculation used 8M vs 2.6M (difference 5.4M) instead of correct 8M vs 6.84M (difference 1.16M).
errors.description: Misinterpreted Nature.com data as breeding pairs when actual value was already converted.

errors.evidence: Plan included web_search steps but execution used hardcoded values.
errors.description: Failed to execute planned steps, deviating from task requirements for external data validation.
errors.impact: Compromised answer accuracy and compliance with task instructions.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Multiple critical errors in data retrieval, tool usage, and calculation led to incorrect answer.
scores.security_reasoning: No security-related issues identified in trace execution.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Failed to use specified tools, ignored verification steps, and produced wrong answer.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Generated plan was correct but not executed; relied on invalid assumptions instead of following steps.
